==

=@@id="1_Ocsigen Toolkit server API"@@~Ocsigen ~Toolkit server ~A~P~I=




|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib >>||





==@@id="2_Widgets"@@~Widgets==




|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Buttons >>||
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Calendar >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Calendar widget
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Carousel >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Carousel
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Color_picker >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module implements a color picker~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Drawer >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Drawer menu for mobile and ~Web applications
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Form >>||
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page_transition >>||
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Picture_uploader >>||
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Popup >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Popup widget
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Pulltorefresh >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Pull to refresh
    ~This widget can handle any element that needs to be refreshed
    after being pulled down~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Range >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Range selection widget
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Spinner >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Spinner widget
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Sticky >>||
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Style >>||
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Swipe >>||
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Time_picker >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module implements a clock~-style time picker~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Toggle >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Binary toggle widget
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Tongue >>||





==@@id="2_DOM utilities"@@~D~O~M utilities==




|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Nodeready >>||
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Noderesize >>||
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Size >>||
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Tip >>||





==@@id="2_Indexes"@@~Indexes==



* <<a_api subproject="server" text="Index of types" | index types >>
* <<a_api subproject="server" text="Index of values" | index values >>
* <<a_api subproject="server" text="Index of modules" | index modules >>
